title: ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers limited emergency assistance with electric and water bills. Provides vouchers for clothing, household items, and furniture at the St. Vincent de Paul thrift store, and a food pantry is also available. Limited assistance for eyeglasses and bus passes for work or medical appointments only. Financial assistance is available once every 18 months. 435 SE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Must have a shut off notice for utility assistance (12 or 5 day) All other services: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry and Utilities: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Thrift store: Monday-Friday 9am–5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Email (503) 472-6216 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-6216 Office (503) 472-2003 Store Office (503) 472-6216 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to set up an intake appointment. Walk-ins accepted for food and utilities. Clients are asked to bring their own bags for food pantry and thrift store items. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Shut-off notice for electric or water assistance. Varies based on the service being provided. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of McMinnville Services: Clothing Vouchers Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries Glasses/Contact Lenses Household Goods Vouchers Thrift Shops Transportation Passes Water Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE
